message:
🐛 fix: banner X button propagation opens modal instead of dismissing (#8420)

On console.kubestellar.io (isDemoModeForced), clicking the X button on
the demo banner opened the SetupInstructionsDialog instead of dismissing
the banner. The CTA button already handles opening the setup dialog.

- Add demoBannerDismissed state to Layout
- X button now dismisses the banner on forced-demo sites
- Banner height calculations respect dismissed state so content
  shifts up correctly
- Add dismissBanner i18n key for the new aria-label

Fixes #8410

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,7 +54,8 @@
     "replaceCard": "Replace Card",
     "askAI": "Ask AI about this card",
     "installConsole": "Install your own console",
-    "exitDemoMode": "Exit demo mode"
+    "exitDemoMode": "Exit demo mode",
+    "dismissBanner": "Dismiss banner"
   },
   "labels": {
     "loading": "Loading...",
